narrative:
Mt Orab South (precinct in Brown County) has 1,035 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
